vocab.meaning: trông cực kỳ sang trọng, lộng lẫy và đắt tiền
vocab.example: Even though they are just sneakers, this limited edition pair makes me feel like I look a million dollars.

vocab.meaning: ở một đẳng cấp cao hơn, tốt hơn những thứ khác
vocab.example: In terms of durability, genuine leather loafers are definitely a notch above synthetic ones.

vocab.meaning: thu hút sự chú ý, bắt mắt
vocab.example: I tend to go for shoes with vibrant colors that really catch the eye when I'm walking down the street.

vocab.meaning: tốn quá nhiều tiền, làm khánh kiệt tài chính
vocab.example: You can find stylish footwear that looks high-end without having to break the bank.

vocab.meaning: bận rộn, đang di chuyển liên tục
vocab.example: Since I'm always on the go, I prioritize comfort and support over flashy designs.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp, bắt kịp (xu hướng hoặc nhịp độ)
vocab.example: It's quite exhausting trying to keep pace with the ever-changing trends in the sneakerhead community.
These customized running shoes were expensive, but given how they’ve prevented injuries, they were worth every penny.

vocab.word: at the end of the day
vocab.meaning: suy cho cùng, xét cho cùng
vocab.example: At the end of the day, the most important feature of any footwear is how it protects your feet.
I enjoy wearing avant-garde boots because they allow me to stand out from the crowd and express my individuality.

vocab.meaning: hàng thật, hàng chính hãng (không phải đồ giả)
vocab.example: I saved up for months to ensure I bought the real McCoy rather than a cheap knock-off from the market.
